page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.6xlarge is a storage-focused virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 24 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz, utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 96.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. A key characteristic of this instance is its massive bundled local storage, consisting of 70,866 GB of HDD capacity. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core CPU performance, measured via stress-ng and Geekbench, falls into the bottom 25 percent, and single-threaded gzip compression is in the bottom 10 percent. However, multi-core execution scales to average levels, with Passmark CPU, Geekbench multi-core, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression all registering in the middle 50 percent. Memory bandwidth tests for both small cached blocks and large uncached blocks also demonstrate average performance.

Given the massive local HDD capacity, this instance offers high storage density, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring vast local data retention without the premium cost of SSDs. It is well-suited for large-scale data warehousing, log archiving, big data MapReduce jobs, and backup repositories. It is less suitable for single-threaded applications or latency-sensitive real-time databases due to its weaker single-core performance and mechanical storage media.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.6xlarge is a storage-optimized instance featuring 24 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 96.0 GB of RAM and a massive 70,866 GB of local HDD storage, alongside a 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data shows weak single-core CPU performance and poor single-threaded compression, but multi-core operations, memory bandwidth, and database operations perform at average levels. This hardware profile provides high storage density, making it a qualitatively cost-effective option for massive data storage and batch processing. The instance is best suited for distributed file systems, big data analytics, log processing, and cold storage workloads where high-capacity local storage is prioritized over high-speed random I/O.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.6xlarge is a storage-focused instance with 24 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 96 GB RAM, and 70,866 GB of local HDD storage, designed for high-capacity data processing and archiving.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.6xlarge features 24 dedicated Intel cores, 96 GB RAM, and 70,866 GB of local HDD storage for data-intensive workloads.
tagline: A high-capacity storage instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and over seventy terabytes of local HDD capacity for large-scale data workloads.

96.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
70,866 GB of bundled local HDD storage for high-density data retention
Average multi-core and memory bandwidth performance
Optimized for big data, log archiving, and distributed file systems
